  • Hilfe

    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

    Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    AnimatedTrain
    Represents a train with animated movement between stations.
    BookingPanel
    Panel for searching and displaying train route options between stations.
    DatabaseManager
    Manages the MySQL database connection using the Singleton pattern.
    MainFrame
    Main application window for the Train Simulator.
    MapPanel
    Panel displaying the live train map with animated train movements.
    RotatableIconLabel
    A custom JLabel that can display a rotated SVG icon.
    RouteOption
    Represents a complete journey option consisting of one or more route segments.
    RouteOptionDAO
    Data Access Object for finding and managing route options between stations.
    RoutePart
    Represents a single segment of a train journey.
    SimulationController
    Controls the simulation time and speed for the train simulator.
    Start
    Entry point for the Train Simulator application.
    Station
    Represents a train station in the transportation network.
    StationDAO
    Data Access Object for managing Station entities.
    Test
    Test utility class for generating SQL INSERT statements for train trips.
    TrackSegment
    Represents a physical track segment connecting two stations.
    TrackSegmentDAO
    Data Access Object for managing TrackSegment entities.
    Train
    Represents an individual train in the transportation system.
    TrainType
    Represents a classification of trains with shared operational characteristics.
    TripDAO
    Data Access Object for managing train trips.
